company_box_content: Welcome to the Villeroy & Boch Group!

The Villeroy & Boch Group is one of the global leaders in the premium Dining & Lifestyle and Bathroom & Wellness sectors. Since its foundation in 1748 the company stands for leading innovation, contemporary design, and exceptional quality. Uniting two iconic brands – Villeroy & Boch and Ideal Standard – we combine centuries of expertise with forward-thinking solutions to create high-quality, eco-conscious products that elevate modern living.

Guided by our vision “The Art of Bringing Something Special Into Every Day” we blend timeless elegance with cutting-edge technology to deliver exceptional experiences. With our commitment to premium design, responsible manufacturing, and continuous innovation we empower architects and developers to create spaces of wellbeing and consumers to enjoy moments of connection.

Headquartered in Mettlach, Germany, Villeroy & Boch Group has around 12,000 employees around the globe and is active in around 140 markets worldwide. As a united global team, we bring together our heritage, creativity, and market insights to set new benchmarks across our industry. Whether through innovation, aesthetics, or functionality, we are dedicated to delivering excellence in every detail.
Follow us to discover the latest company news, product innovations, and updates from across the Villeroy & Boch Group.
company_description: Villeroy & Boch Group is a global leader in ceramics and lifestyle products, with 12,000 employees in over 40 countries and a history dating back to 1748. The company combines brands like Villeroy & Boch and Ideal Standard, indicating a large multinational corporation.

head: Senior Data Engineer
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 29 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Optiver is a leading global market maker powered by technology, rigorous research, and deep collaboration. As we become increasingly data-driven, our ability to capture, model, and deliver high-quality data at scale is fundamental to maintaining our trading edge. We are seeking a Data Engineer to join our Data Engineering team. In this role, you will own the end-to-end data lifecycle—from raw market data capture through to normalized datasets used by both trading and research.
WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON:
Build and maintain robust data pipelines for capturing and processing raw data.
Ingest, catalog, and manage a variety of data sources, including market data, execution data, reference data, and more.
Model and normalize complex financial datasets to ensure they are clean, consistent, and easily accessible for research and production.
Ensure all datasets are well managed and governed within our global data lake.
Collaborate closely with traders, researchers, and engineers across multiple global offices to understand evolving data requirements and deliver scalable solutions.
Implement rigorous data-quality checks, monitoring, and alerting to guarantee reliability and consistency.
Contribute to the architecture and scaling of our global data platform to support ever-growing data-intensive strategies.
WHAT YOU WILL NEED:
5+ years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role in a high-performance environment, preferably within financial services.
Proficiency with Python, C++ is a big plus
Experience with market data & exchange protocol is highly desirable
Solid understanding of data capturing, data modeling, and normalization.
Proficiency in designing and implementing distributed data pipelines.
Experience with lakehouse architectures (e.g., Delta Lake, Databricks) is preferred.
Strong software engineering fundamentals, especially around performance, reliability, and scalability in distributed systems.
Excellent communication skills and the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
Diversity statement
Optiver is committed to
diversity and inclusion
. We encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds, and welcome requests for reasonable adjustments during the process.
Questions?
Get in touch with the recruitment team at careers@optiver.com.au.
Privacy disclaimer
Optiver 重视个人信息的保护。请您在提供个人信息给我们之前，认真阅读Optiver China Privacy Notice, 了解我们如何收集及处理您的个人信息。
Personal information protection is of utmost importance to Optiver. Before you provide any personal information to us, we strongly urge you to read our
Privacy Policy
to acknowledge how we collect and process your personal information.

4. Ensure all datasets are well managed and governed within our global data lake.

1. 5+ years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role in a high-performance environment, preferably within financial services.
2. Proficiency with Python, C++ is a big plus
3. Experience with market data & exchange protocol is highly desirable
4. Solid understanding of data capturing, data modeling, and normalization.
5. Proficiency in designing and implementing distributed data pipelines.
6. Experience with lakehouse architectures (e.g., Delta Lake, Databricks) is preferred.
7. Strong software engineering fundamentals, especially around performance, reliability, and scalability in distributed systems.
8. Excellent communication skills and the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
company_box_content: Create better access and prices for all – that’s our goal for financial markets the world over. As a leading global electronic market maker, we are dedicated to our mission of continuously improving the market. It’s a responsibility we don’t take lightly. It’s the driving force behind our business. Even in times of extreme volatility, we stay the course. Resolute in our belief that the market should always be liquid for economies to thrive.

As one of the oldest market-making institutions, we’re a trusted partner of exchanges. Our contribution to them ensures they remain stable, transparent and competitive. We provide liquidity to financial markets using our own capital, at our own risk, trading a wide range of products: listed derivatives, cash equities, ETFs, bonds, and foreign currencies.
We strongly believe in the positive power of the world’s markets. That’s why we’re committed to leading the way in market making for environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) products.
Optiver is a global company with offices in Amsterdam, Sydney, Chicago, Austin, Taipei, Hong Kong, Shanghai, London and Singapore.
company_description: Optiver is a global market maker with offices in multiple countries, providing liquidity in financial markets using technology and research. The company focuses on electronic trading and has a strong presence in financial hubs, indicating a large financial services firm.

head: Demand Analyst, APAC
info: 中国 上海市 · 1 个月前 · 29 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

We are seeking a highly motivated and analytical professional to join our APAC team to drive excellence in demand planning and S&OP processes. Reporting to the Operations Director, APAC - this role plays a key part in coordinating regional forecasts, supporting data-driven decision-making, and enhancing forecast accuracy across multiple markets. The ideal candidate is a proactive team player with strong communication skills, a keen eye for detail, and the ability to thrive in a dynamic, matrixed organization. The position will also require
travel between Suzhou and Shanghai to collaborate closely with cross-functional teams and stakeholders.
Main Responsibilities
1. Coordinate, support, and consolidate the monthly rolling 12-month forecast for all IG businesses across Asia Pacific.
2. Upload the regional rolling forecast into the IBP system.
3. Lead and facilitate the APAC S&OP Demand Review meetings.
4. Oversee and standardize regional forecast reporting processes, ensuring timely and consistent monthly updates.
5. Provide analytical support to enhance forecast accuracy and identify opportunities for continuous improvement.
6. Support APAC-wide S&OP initiatives and related projects.
Requirements
1. Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related discipline
2. Minimum of 5 years of progressive experience in supply chain functions including planning, procurement, and demand analysis.
3. Prior experience in a manufacturing environment is highly desirable.
4. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with strong command of English, with the ability to collaborate effectively across diverse teams and functions.
5. Strong analytical, problem-solving, and critical-thinking capabilities.
6. Demonstrated negotiation skills with the ability to influence and achieve win-win outcomes.
7. Proven experience in leading change initiatives within a complex and highly matrixed organization.
8. Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint.
9. Hands-on experience with JDE or other ERP systems.
10. Willingness to travel frequently between Suzhou and Shanghai as part of regional collaboration and business coordination.
company_box_content: IMI is a global leader in fluid and motion control, serving markets underpinned by three long-term growth trends – automation, energy efficiency and healthcare demand. We apply world-class engineering expertise to optimise performance and deliver consistent, long-term value – for our customers and our business.

We engineer bespoke solutions, including valves, actuators and controls, that enhance our customers’ safety, productivity and sustainability. Developed in deep partnership with our customers, our customised solutions are a small part of their systems but deliver outsized impact.
company_description: IMI is a global leader in fluid and motion control, serving markets like automation and energy efficiency with customized engineering solutions. The company operates internationally with a focus on innovation, indicating a large industrial corporation.

At Prologis, we don’t just lead the industry—we define it with a 1.3 billion square foot portfolio and an annual throughput of approximately $3.2 trillion. From agile supply chains to energy solutions, our ecosystems help your business move faster, operate smarter and grow sustainably. People First

And because of that, we provide a generous total rewards package and dedicate both time and resources to leadership development. Our team is intentional about cultivating a culture rooted in diversity, equity, and inclusion so that everyone at Prologis feels a sense of belonging.

We create the intelligent infrastructure that powers global commerce, seamlessly connecting the digital and physical worlds. From agile supply chains to clean energy solutions, our ecosystems help your business move faster, operate smarter and grow sustainably. company_box_content: Tate & Lyle's purpose, Transforming Lives Through the Science of Food, inspires everything we do. Whether it’s by making food and drink healthier and tastier
or making a difference to our local communities, we believe we can successfully grow our business and have a positive impact on society.

What is it we do? Simply put, we make healthy food tastier and tasty food healthier. Our work is driven by consumer health needs and trends, governments desire to build and support healthy communities, and the need for affordable food and nutrition in many parts of the world. We deliver ingredients and solutions to meet all these needs. Our speciality sweeteners and fibres help reduce sugar and calories. Our fibres fortify food and improve digestive health. Our mouthfeel solutions provide texture and shelf life and make food creamy, crispy and stable without all the sugar and fat.
Across the globe, we are transforming lives through the science of food. And we need talented and skilled people to help us on this journey.
company_description: Tate & Lyle is a global food ingredients company focusing on health and taste solutions, with operations across multiple regions. The company provides specialty sweeteners and fibres for food and drink industries, indicating a large multinational corporation.

head: Data Analytics and Automation Consultant
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 2 天前 · 40 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Join EPAM China as a
Data Analytics And Automation Consultant
in Beijing.

You will leverage AI and ML technologies to analyze wireless testing data, generate insightful reports and develop automation solutions. This role offers the chance to work with global teams, shape regulatory standards and grow your skills in a dynamic, innovative environment.
Primary Skills:
1. Data Analysis Coding
2. Automation Development
3. Webpage Design And Reporting
Responsibilities
1. Conduct AI/ML studies on wireless testing reports, regulations and standards from various countries
2. Generate reports using AI/ML technologies including Large Language Models
3. Perform testing data process from various market devices for wireless performance
4. Work with test labs to optimize data summaries and reporting
5. Develop automation software for regulatory testing processes
Requirements
1. Strong coding experience for data analysis and automation tasks
2. Webpage design experience and skills in report generation
3. Basic knowledge of RF test instruments for Wifi, BT and Cellular technologies
4. Proven planning, interpersonal skills and ability to work in multi-functional teams across time zones
5. Self-motivated with proficient English speaking and writing abilities
We offer
1. By choosing EPAM, you're getting a job at one of the most loved workplaces according to Newsweek 2021 & 2022&2023
2. Employee ideas are the main driver of our business. We have a very supportive environment where your voice matters
3. You will be challenged while working side-by-side with the best talent globally. We work with top-notch technologies, constantly seeking new industry trends and best practices
4. We offer a transparent career path and an individual roadmap to engineer your future & accelerate your journey

5. At EPAM, you can find vast opportunities for self-development: online courses and libraries, mentoring programs, partial grants of certification, and experience exchange with colleagues around the world. You will learn, contribute, and grow with us
How We Hire
• Here, we summarize the typical journey to finding a job within EPAM.
• Apply and tell us about yourself!
• Go through some standard interviews:
1. - General interview with a recruiter
2. - Technical interview with our technology experts
3. - Manager interview or Offer interview with a hiring manager
• Get ready to join the team!
• Not sure if you meet all the requirements? No problem. Let's talk anyway and find out more!
• It takes 1 min of application to start the journey with us. Apply now!
Life at EPAM
1. EPAM Systems Inc. (EPAM) is a leading digital transformation services and product engineering company.

2. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi-national teams, contribute to various innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to learn and grow continuously.
company_box_content: Since 1993, EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) has used its software engineering expertise to become a leading global provider of digital engineering, cloud and AI-enabled transformation services, and a leading business and experience consulting partner for global enterprises and ambitious startups. We address our clients’ transformation challenges by fusing EPAM Continuum’s integrated strategy, experience and technology consulting with our 30+ years of engineering execution to speed our clients’ time to market and drive greater value from their innovations and digital investments.

We leverage AI and GenAI to deliver transformative solutions that accelerate our clients’ digital innovation and enhance their competitive edge. Through platforms like EPAM AI/RUN™ and initiatives like DIALX Lab, we integrate advanced AI technologies into tailored business strategies, driving significant industry impact and fostering continuous innovation.

We deliver globally, but engage locally with our expert teams of consultants, architects, designers and engineers, making the future real for our clients, our partners and our people around the world.

We believe the right solutions are the ones that improve people’s lives and fuel competitive advantage for our clients across diverse industries. Our thinking comes to life in the experiences, products and platforms we design and bring to market.

Added to the S&P 500 and the Forbes Global 2000 in 2021 and recognized by Glassdoor and Newsweek as Most Loved Workplace, our multidisciplinary teams serve customers across six continents. We are proud to be among the top 15 companies in Information Technology Services in the Fortune 1000 and to be recognized as a leader in the IDC MarketScapes for Worldwide Experience Build Services, Worldwide Experience Design Services and Worldwide Software Engineering Services.
company_description: EPAM is a global digital engineering and transformation services company with over 30 years of experience, serving clients across six continents. The company is a Fortune 1000 firm and recognized as a most loved workplace, indicating a large technology services corporation.

head: Research Analyst - Power & Renewables, China
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Wood Mackenzie is the global data and analytics business for the renewables, energy, and natural resources industries. Enhanced by technology. Enriched by human intelligence. In an ever-changing world, companies and governments need reliable and actionable insight to lead the transition to a sustainable future. That’s why we cover the entire supply chain with unparalleled breadth and depth, backed by over 50 years’ experience. Our team of over 2,400 experts, operating across 30 global locations, are enabling customers’ decisions through real-time analytics, consultancy, events and thought leadership. Together, we deliver the insight they need to separate risk from opportunity and make confident decisions when it matters most.
WoodMac.com
Wood Mackenzie Brand Video
Wood Mackenzie Values
Inclusive – we succeed together
Trusting – we choose to trust each other
Customer committed – we put customers at the heart of our decisions
Future Focused – we accelerate change
Curious – we turn knowledge into action

We are looking for a Research Analyst to join Wood Mackenzie’s Power & Renewables team in China. Responsibilities will include conducting original quantitative and qualitative research on the market, and delivering this analysis to clients through written reports, presentations, public speaking, addressing specific customer enquiries and through the delivery of bespoke consulting engagements. You will help with expanding our regional power and renewable research using analytical or quantitative tools. You will aggregate and summarise project level datasets, track market activity, and forecast installation volumes and pricing trends. You will build strong ties with key industry stakeholders and engage with clients and prospects in collaboration with our sales team. You will collaborate with other Wood Mackenzie analysts covering power markets and renewable technologies and commodities in the region to ensure our analysis is robust, integrated and thought-provoking.
Knowledge, Skills And Experience
You have experience working in wind, renewables or power markets industry for 2-3 years.
You are passionate about renewable energy and come with strong knowledge of the sector and markets in China.
You have an analytical mindset and an eye for detail, and you can think outside the box and generate new ideas.
You are comfortable working with common Excel functions and query languages.
You have strong networking skills and can show that you can develop relationships with key industry stakeholders.
You can communicate new ideas and concepts to audiences in an engaging way, both verbally and in writing.
You are a strong team player and a natural self-starter who can work independently.
You are comfortable disrupting your routine, as you will constantly be looking to learn and provide in-depth analysis of industry trends and innovative market dynamics.
Equal Opportunities

We are an equal opportunities employer. This means we are committed to recruiting the best people regardless of their race, colour, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. You can find out more about your rights under the law at
www.eeoc.gov
If you are applying for a role and have a physical or mental disability, we will support you with your application or through the hiring process.
1. Inclusive – we succeed together
2. Trusting – we choose to trust each other
3. Customer committed – we put customers at the heart of our decisions
4. Future Focused – we accelerate change
5. Curious – we turn knowledge into action
1. You have experience working in wind, renewables or power markets industry for 2-3 years.
2. You are passionate about renewable energy and come with strong knowledge of the sector and markets in China.
3. You have an analytical mindset and an eye for detail, and you can think outside the box and generate new ideas.
4. You are comfortable working with common Excel functions and query languages.
5. You have strong networking skills and can show that you can develop relationships with key industry stakeholders.
6. You can communicate new ideas and concepts to audiences in an engaging way, both verbally and in writing.
7. You are a strong team player and a natural self-starter who can work independently.
8. You are comfortable disrupting your routine, as you will constantly be looking to learn and provide in-depth analysis of industry trends and innovative market dynamics.
company_box_content: In the middle of the energy transition, businesses and governments are faced with significant challenges. But the pace and scale of change mean every decision is made under mounting pressure.  Now, more than ever, companies need reliable data, analytics and actionable insight.

Wood Mackenzie is the leading global provider of data and analytics solutions for the renewables, energy and natural resources sectors . Wood Mackenzie’s services include data, analytics, insight, events and consultancy.  A trusted partner for over 50 years, Wood Mackenzie’s team has over 2,300 experts across more than 30 global locations who cover the entire supply chain. Wood Mackenzie’s data and analytics empowers energy producers, governments and financial institutions to be confident in their investment decisions in the face of rapidly evolving markets. Part of the Veritas group.
company_description: Wood Mackenzie is a global data and analytics business for energy and natural resources, with over 2,400 experts in 30 locations worldwide. The company provides insights and consultancy services, indicating a large specialized analytics firm.

job_details_content: ##              职位简介
职位描述
1、深入理解业务战略和人力资源体系，通过数据分析、行业调研、专家访谈等方式，诊断人力资源管理中的关键问题，设计优化方案，并推动执行落地；
2、构建并持续优化人力相关数据的分析模型，支持组织在人力投入、结构配置与发展路径等方面的战略决策；
3、高效的为招聘和HRBP团队提供数据报告，通过分析发现改进的关键点并推动业务团队改进。
职位要求
1、本科或以上学历；
2、对组织管理与人的行为有强烈好奇心，具备优秀的数据敏感度和分析能力，能够从复杂信息中提炼管理观察，并形成建议方案；
3、具备系统性思维，能够准确定义问题、建立分析假设，并设计兼顾实效与成本的可执行方案；
4、出色的沟通表达与跨部门影响力，能够通过数据叙事清晰传递分析结果与战略建议；
5、具备进取心、开放协作精神和抗压韧性，能在复杂环境中推动项目落地；
6、英文口语及书面语皆流利，可作为工作语言使用。

head: Data Engineer
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 1 个月前 · 84 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About the Role

We're looking for a Data Engineer to design and maintain data platforms that power trading and research. You'll work on data pipelines, APIs, storage systems, and quality monitoring to ensure reliable, scalable, and efficient data services.
Responsibilities
1. Design, develop, and maintain market data systems, APIs, and ETL pipelines.
2. Manage data assets including databases, cloud storage, and metadata.
3. Integrate data vendors and automate ingestion, migration, and workflows.
4. Implement monitoring and alerting for data quality and reliability.
5. Optimize platform performance and support analytics and research tools.
Qualifications
1. Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science or related field.
2. Strong programming skills in Python (NumPy, Pandas) and solid SQL knowledge.
3. Familiarity with Linux/Unix and database principles.
4. Good understanding of algorithms, debugging, and system design.
5. Strong communication, problem-solving, and teamwork skills.
Required Skills
1. Strong programming skills in Python (NumPy, Pandas) and solid SQL knowledge.
2. Familiarity with Linux/Unix and database principles.
3. Good understanding of algorithms, debugging, and system design.
4. Strong communication, problem-solving, and teamwork skills.
Preferred Skills
1. Experience with Airflow, cloud storage, big data platforms, or data warehouses.
2. Knowledge of time-series databases (InfluxDB, TDengine) and distributed systems.
3. Additional back-end languages (C++/Go/Java) are a plus.
4. Background in finance or quantitative workflows is an advantage.

head: Financial Performance Analyst
info: 中国 江苏省 宜兴市 · 重新发布时间: 6 天前 · 17 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Location: 江苏省宜兴经济开发区杏里路16号
A Snapshot of Your Day

To support the Controlling Manager in driving financial transparency, forecast reliability, and digital transformation by analyzing performance data, preparing reports, and applying advanced analytics tools to improve decision-making across SGTC operations.
How You’ll Make An Impact
Monthly Financial Reporting
Prepare monthly financial performance reports across SGTC business units, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely delivery.
Performance Analysis & Forecasting
Analyze financial results by comparing actuals, forecasts, and budgets.
Identify key performance drivers and provide actionable insights.
Proactively drive process improvements to support the achievement of financial KPIs.
Cost Center Management
Prepare cost center reports, monitor and analyze cost center expenses, and collaborate with other departments to ensure spending remains within budget and aligned with financial targets.
Digitalization & Analytics
Act as the digitalization specialist within the controlling department.
Apply IT tools such as Tableau, Alteryx, and other analytics platforms to enhance financial analysis and reporting.
Lead initiatives to automate reporting processes, improve data visualization, and support the team’s digital transformation.
Ad-hoc Assignments
Perform other ad-hoc tasks and analysis as required by the Controlling Manager or business needs.
What You Bring
Bachelor’s or master’s degree in accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related major
3-5 years working experience in financial analysis or controlling, preferably in the manufacturing or factory environment.
Strong analytical skills and proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP, and BI tools (e.g., Tableau, Alteryx).
Experience with forecasting, budgeting, and variance analysis.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
Fluent in English and Mandarin.
Who is Siemens Energy?

At Siemens Energy, we are more than just an energy technology company. With ~100,000 dedicated employees in more than 90 countries, we develop the energy systems of the future, ensuring that the growing energy demand of the global community is met reliably and sustainably. The technologies created in our research departments and factories drive the energy transition and provide the base for one sixth of the world's electricity generation.

Our global team is committed to making sustainable, reliable, and affordable energy a reality by pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We uphold a 150-year legacy of innovation that encourages our search for people who will support our focus on decarbonization, new technologies, and energy transformation.
Our Commitment to Diversity

Lucky for us, we are not all the same. Through diversity we generate power. We run on inclusion and our combined creative energy is fueled by over 130 nationalities. Siemens Energy celebrates character – no matter what ethnic background, gender, age, religion, identity, or disability. We energize society, all of society, and we do not discriminate based on our differences.

company_box_content: Siemens Energy is one of the world’s leading energy technology companies. The company works with its customers and partners on energy systems for the future, thus supporting the transition to a more sustainable world. With its portfolio of products, solutions and services, Siemens Energy covers almost the entire energy value chain – from power generation and transmission to storage. The portfolio includes conventional and renewable energy technology, such as gas and steam turbines, hybrid power plants operated with hydrogen, and power generators and transformers. A majority stake in the wind power subsidiary Siemens Gamesa Renewable Energy (SGRE) makes Siemens Energy a global market leader for renewable energies. An estimated one-sixth of the electricity generated worldwide is based on technologies from Siemens Energy. Siemens Energy employs 103,000 people worldwide in more than 90 countries and generated revenue of around €39.1 billion in fiscal year 2025.
Siemens Energy is a trademark licensed by Siemens AG
company_description: A global energy technology company with over 100,000 employees, developing sustainable energy systems and technologies across more than 90 countries, focusing on power generation, transmission, and storage.

job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Jump Trading Group is committed to world class research. We empower exceptional talents in Mathematics, Physics, and Computer Science to seek scientific boundaries, push through them, and apply cutting edge research to global financial markets. Our culture is unique. Constant innovation requires fearlessness, creativity, intellectual honesty, and a relentless competitive streak. We believe in winning together and unlocking unique individual talent by incenting collaboration and mutual respect. At Jump, research outcomes drive more than superior risk adjusted returns. We design, develop, and deploy technologies that change our world, fund start-ups across industries, and partner with leading global research organizations and universities to solve problems.

We are seeking to hire a candidate with strong financial operations, management and business analysis skills to join our global Clearing team based in Shanghai, China. You will be part of a group that ensures the reliable flow of our trading activity between our various trading venues and clearing firms across the globe and will assist with the development of new business and back office initiatives.
What You'll Do:
Learn and support critical daily Clearing functions, including trade capture, lifecycle management, reconciliation and break resolution across all products and venues
Assist with bringing new business (i.e. new products, markets, strategies, brokers, etc.) online
Assist with the continued development of Jump’s back-office infrastructure and finding value-add opportunities to further leverage this infrastructure
Assist with identifying and improving process deficiencies
Assist in creating and/or improving written processes and procedures
Work closely with traders, understand trading workflows, and build support tailored to their needs.
Strong collaboration with developers, including providing clear specifications and ensuring follow-through to meet business requirements.
Regular communication with counterparties, prime brokers, traders, and various internal operations support teams in multiple regions
Other duties as assigned or needed.
Able to work on public holidays.
Skills You’ll Need:
At least 7+ year’s work experience preferred in a related capacity. Experience managing an operations team or sub-team, a plus
Deep knowledge of post-trade lifecycles of Equities, Treasuries, Futures, FX, Options, and/or Swaps, etc.
Experience with external relationship management, including technology vendors, brokers, banks, etc.

Strong project management and business analysis experience within financial operations, with demonstrated examples improving processes, supporting bringing new business online and working with Technology to build back office infrastructure.
A strong attention to detail and desire to maintain accuracy while processing large volumes of data under strict time constraints
Excellent organizational skills with the ability to exercise good judgment and pro-active decision-making in a fast paced and dynamic environment
Accomplished communication skills, with a demonstrated ability to effectively communicate (written and verbal) in English and Mandarin to both internal and external contacts on a global basis
Proven ability to maintain composure during stressful situations
Minimum of Bachelors’ degree in Business, Economics, Finance or related fields
Reliable and predictable availability

company_box_content: For more than 25 years, Jump Trading has been home to people who see trading as the most fascinating problem in the world and want to solve it from every angle.
Headquartered in Chicago with 13 offices across 8 countries, we operate across asset classes, time zones, and horizons. If it trades, we want to trade it.

We are traders, engineers, and researchers working side by side to build the systems that move global markets. Our culture is built on curiosity, precision, and relentless iteration. We care deeply about impact, collaboration, and solving problems few ever get to see.

At Jump Trading, AI and machine learning are central to how we trade and build. We design and deploy advanced models, infrastructure, and tools to operate at scale in high-stakes, adversarial environments. From low-latency systems to cutting-edge research, we push the boundaries of what is possible.

We are also committed to the next generation of talent. Our student programs, from internships to our fully funded PhD Fellowships, provide hands-on experience, mentorship, and opportunities to do meaningful work. We support students at leading conferences worldwide and invite them to work with our teams on real-world challenges.
company_description: A global electronic market maker with offices in 8 countries, specializing in quantitative trading across asset classes using AI and machine learning, with a focus on research and technology innovation.

head: Machine Learning Engineer (Fulfilment ETA)
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 2 周前 · 27 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace

Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team

The Fulfilment Interface Data Science team predicts the estimated time of arrival (ETA) and/or optimise the ETA quotation that balance among the ETA accuracy, system efficiency and marketplace throughput.
Get to Know the Role

We are looking for a Data Scientist to build sophisticated DNN models that predict ETA for Food orders and Transport bookings accurately under uncertainty. You will report to the Head of Data Science and is based onsite in Beijing.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

You will develop innovative Machine Learning or Deep Learning model that can predict the ETA of the food orders accurately. You will also build Optimisation models to balance the ETA accuracy and system efficiency.
You will establish pipelines to automate the model retraining and parameter tuning and serve the model in production.
You will build dashboards to monitor the model accuracy and service health. This will involve tracking model performance, identifying data drift issues, and implementing improvements.
You will create technical documents outlining the methodologies and findings of your work. You will present solutions and explain complex concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
You will collaborate with Product Analytic and Product Manager to conduct A/B experiment and data analysis.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
You hold a Bachelor or Master Degree in a relevant field such as Computer Science, Operations Research, Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, or Software Engineering.
You have solid background in at least two of the following domains: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Causal Inference and Operation Research.
You have 1 years of relevant working experience in tech companies or academic institutions.
You are proficient in Python, Tensorflow/Pytorch, SQL, and Spark, git.
You can develop data processing ETL pipelines to support data analysis, model training, and model serving tasks.
You are familiar with Version Control Systems such as git, git-flow, and understand the full software development life-cycle.
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab

We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that enables diverse Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. As an equal opportunity employer, we consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, religion, age, gender identity, sexual orientation, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

Grabbers come from all over the world, and we are united by a common mission: to drive Southeast Asia forward by creating economic empowerment for everyone.

info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 2 周前 · 51 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Company Description
ABOUT NIELSENIQ

NielsenIQ is a global measurement and data analytics company that provides the most complete and trusted view available of consumers and markets worldwide. We provide consumer packaged goods manufacturers/fast-moving consumer goods and retailers with accurate, actionable information and insights and a complete picture of the complex and changing marketplace that companies need to innovate and grow. Our approach marries proprietary NielsenIQ data with other data sources to help clients around the world understand what’s happening now, what’s happening next, and how to best act on this knowledge. We like to be in the middle of the action. That’s why you can find us at work in over 90 countries, covering more than 90% of the world’s population. For more information, visit www.niq.com.

NielsenIQ is committed to hiring and retaining a diverse workforce. We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action-Employer, making decisions without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability status, age, marital status, protected veteran status or any other protected class.
Job Description
Job Description
Scope:
The DC team is at the intersection between Client Team and the Data Science Team. Together, you will actively work with both stakeholders.
Markets : Greater China and possibly some projects in Asia Pacific Region
Global/regional/ local: Sub-Regional/Local
Purpose of the role:
Being the key contact point between data science and commercial teams, helping commercial team to understand the retail products and the methodology behind it.
Supporting the clients’ business needs and driving internal product enhancement at the same time.
Analyzing large amounts of data captured by NielsenIQ’s research team to arrive at insights regarding trends as well as opportunities for further study/drilldown.

Working hand in hand with the client to explain to them the specific aspects of the studies being undertaken and help the client better understand the data in a more intelligible way through a simple, but effective methodology.
Respond to client questions regarding data irregularities and help the client understand the methodology being employed by NielsenIQ’s statistical tools.
Create clear insights and examples, either through visualizations or through raw data analysis in order to answer the main question of WHY the data is behaving a certain way.
Engage and align with multiple stakeholders on data requirements as well as in design for new studies.
Testing new methods, softwares and workflows constantly and checking if they can improve productivity.
Main Accountabilities:
Work closely with key account clients to ensure that their data requirements are satisfied and that they are satisfied with NielsenIQ’s retail analysis methodology.
Conduct various studies within departments in NielsenIQ for updating, improving and creating new data requirements for the client.
Understand client requirements and translate them into intelligent insights by creatively using NielsenIQ’s data.
Contribute to creating best practices for the country/ cluster/ region and sharing them with other data departments
Improve the product through active inputs and engagement with the Data Science team.

head: Specialist, Business Insights - Shenzhen (商业数据与洞察专员 - 深圳)
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 2 周前 · 37 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
HK Express is Hong Kong’s first and only low-cost carrier, always offering great value, affordable fares on one of the youngest and most modern aircraft fleets in the world.
Like you, and just like many people across Asia, we love to travel and discover new places across the world’s most diverse and dynamic region

and at HK Express, we’re opening up new travel experiences that inspire and invigorate millions of people across the region we’re proud to call home. Everything we do is focused on encouraging the spirit of adventure. Our routes provide the inspiration and spontaneity to try somewhere new, disrupting monotonous modern life. As we continue to open up new routes, often in secondary and emerging destinations, our passengers will gain access to an incredible range of places, exploring hidden gems and experiencing local cultures.
We have a diverse and vibrant team that embodies the adventurous spirit of our customers, and loves to travel too. Join us in this journey to make your career even more fulfilling and rewarding.
Overview

As a Specialist, Business Insights, you will collaborate closely with various teams within Commercial department to support their data needs. Your core responsibility is to transform commercial and customer data into actionable insights that drive business growth and enhance commercial performance. You will design, develop, and manage dashboards and reports, ensuring that data is presented clearly, accurately, and in a timely manner to empower informed decision-making across the organization.
Role Purpose
Dashboard Creation and Reporting
Develop and manage performance dashboards for the Commercial team, ensuring timely updates and accuracy.
Build tailored visualizations that enhance data interpretation and supports decision-making and performance accountability.
Develop reports and presentations that are concise, easy to understand, and effectively convey insights and recommendations to stakeholders.
Market Research, Competitive Analysis and Customer Insights
Analyse historical data to support decision making and assist to form recommendation on revenue and pricing strategy. Propose and evaluate actions to improve commercial performance.
Conduct market landscape research including competitive analysis, desktop research and benchmarking exercises.
Support to conduct in-depth research to identify emerging trends and consumer preferences.
Database Management and Maintenance
Work closely with Data Analytics team and support the formulation of data structure.
Support data extraction and ensure data integrity, accuracy, and security.
Propose improvements to database functionality, such as automation, data integration, and enhanced reporting capabilities.
Data Analysis and Insights Generation

Analyse data from direct channels and other data sources to identify patterns, trends, and opportunities. Identify anomalies, and flag potential areas of concern. Prepare regular reports with insights and recommendations for optimisation.
Utilize Customer Experience Analytics and Digital Analytics tools to analyse digital experience, track user sessions, identify pain points, and uncover opportunities.

Implement data-driven improvements: Collaborate with the Digital Experience team to implement or test changes based on insights from aiming to improve website and app performance and drive conversion.
Analyze data from journey experience surveys and brand health trackers to identify key trends and issues, enabling timely actions and guiding long-term improvements through regular reporting.
Qualification
Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Business Administration, Economic, Finance, Accounting, or other quantitative discipline.
Strong analytical and numerical skills, with experience in quantitative/data analysis and handling large datasets ideally. And strong attention to details and accuracy
Demonstrate aptitude for logical analysis, analytical mind, problem identification, and problem solving.
Adaptable, quick learner, able to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
Effective communicator and presenter, with stakeholder management and interpersonal skills.
Skilled in project management, able to prioritize and deliver results under pressure and tight deadlines.
Experience with data visualization tools (Looker Studio, Tableau) and programming (SQL, Python, Google Cloud) is preferred.
Good command of Chinese and English, Cantonese is a valued addition.
Desirable Qualities
Proactive, curious, detail-oriented self-starter with a growth mindset and interest in innovative solutions.
Comfortable influencing cross-functional teams and translating insights into actionable business decisions.
Strong project management skills and commitment to continuous improvement.
职位:
商业数据与洞察专员
地点:
深圳
汇报对象:
商业数据与洞察高级经理/经理
作为商业数据与洞察专员，您将与商务部团队密切协作，了解并满足他们的数据需求。您的核心职责是将商业与客户数据转化为可执行的洞察，推动业务增长并提升商业绩效。您将设计、开发和管理仪表板与报告，确保数据以清晰、准确、及时的方式呈现，以支持全组织的知情决策。
职责与工作内容:
Dashboard 仪表板创建与数据报告（商务洞察方向）
负责商业团队的仪表板创建与管理，确保数据更新及时、准确性高
根据业务需求定制可视化呈现，提升数据解读效率，支持决策与绩效追踪
编制简明扼要的商业报告与简报，清晰传达洞察与建议，突出关键发现、影响与行动建议
市场研究、竞争分析与客户洞察
通过市场研究、竞争对手分析和客户洞察，支持商业决策与策略制定，辅助决策并提出定价策略的优化建议
进行市场景观研究，包括竞争分析、市场环境评估、桌面研究和基准测试
支持开展深入研究，识别新兴趋势与消费者偏好
数据库管理与性能优化
与数据分析团队密切合作，支持数据结构的制定与改进
协助数据提取，确保数据完整性、准确性与安全性
提出数据库功能改进建议，如自动化、数据集成和增强报告能力
数据分析与洞察报告撰写
分析来自直接渠道及其他数据源的数据，识别模式、趋势与机会，标注异常并提出改进建议
借助客户体验分析和数字分析工具，分析体验、数字足迹、识别痛点并挖掘机会
与数字体验(客户体验)团队合作，基于洞察执行或测试改动，以提升网站和应用性能并推动转化。
分析客户旅程体验、品牌健康度评估等数据，识别关键趋势，定期汇报并推动持续优化及长期改进
任职资格
数学、统计学、计算机科学、工商管理、经济学、金融、会计或其他定量学科
较强的分析与数值能力，具备定量数据分析与处理大规模数据集的经验
具备逻辑分析、分析思维、问题识别与解决能力
适应性强、学习能力强，能在快节奏环境中独立工作并与团队协作
有效沟通与演示能力，具备利益相关者管理及人际交往技巧
项目管理能力，能在压力和紧迫的时限内优先排序并交付结果
有数据可视化工具经验（Looker Studio、Tableau）以及编程能力（SQL、Python、Google Cloud）者优先
中英文良好，粤语者为加分项
理想素质
积极主动、好奇、注重细节，具备成长型思维，乐于寻求创
解决方案快速学习、对新工具与方法保持热情
跨文化沟通与协作能力，善于在多团队环境中推动进展
能够影响跨职能团队并将洞察转化为可执行的商业决策
强烈的项目管理能力，持续改进意识

company_box_content: Here at HK Express, we are built on a culture of respect, opportunity, innovation and travel. We are the pioneer and aspire to build Hong Kong’s own, true low-cost carrier. We try our best to understand what our customers need. We can relate to the joy of their every travel, their excitement to explore every city and the delight they share with their close ones.

Which is why we are dedicated to offer the greatest value to our customers and to make traveling both possible and accessible to everyone. We are committed to low fares, inflight safety and personalized journeys, offering a variety of choices to satisfy individual preferences.

Currently, we are covering 26+ destinations, operating with a fleet of 28 aircrafts, mostly targeting at exotic Asian cities. We are planning to expand our network in the year to come, flying beyond Japan, China, Thailand or Taiwan, bringing more people on board in the pursuit of adventures!
company_description: Hong Kong's first and only low-cost carrier, operating a fleet of 28 aircraft to over 26 destinations in Asia, focused on providing affordable travel and adventure experiences.

head: Market Data Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 76 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

We are looking for a junior Market Data Analyst with technical expertise in market data analysis, data vendor management, external data acquisition and market data compliance. This role will focus on overseeing Shanghai based market data projects, from acquisition and integration of external data sets to vendor relationship management and ensuring compliance with exchange policies.

As part of our global market data team, you will collaborate with colleagues across multiple offices to collectively manage Optiver's comprehensive global market data footprint. This role is critical in driving the effective use of market data to support trading strategies and ensure alignment with our broader organizational goals.
Who we are:

Since its establishment in 2012, our Shanghai office is a rapidly growing participant in the Chinese markets, trading exchange-listed futures, options and equities in China mainland. Our vision is to become the trusted partner in the development of Chinese financial markets. With the culture of a start-up but the backing of a 35+ year-old trading firm, the Optiver Shanghai office is truly unique. Everyone who joins us will help shape the future of our company and its global impact. Get ready: we are only just beginning.
What you’ll do:
Execute and complete market data-related projects in alignment with the company’s goals.
Liaise regularly with internal stakeholders, including trading, compliance, and IT teams (both locally and globally), to ensure smooth integration of market data practices and strategy
Ensure that market data practices align with compliance standards and monitor data usage to adhere to both regulatory and company policies.
Deliver market data solutions and recommendations to support business operations and trading activities.
Ensure that data usage complies with relevant policies and contributes to cost-effective and risk-managed market data practices.
Develop and maintain relationships with external data vendors
Reviewing relevant contractual obligations and liaising with Legal, Compliance and other relevant teams to ensure data usage risk is mitigated
Who you are:
3+ years of relevant market data operational experience including data sourcing, inventory managementand user management.
Knowledge of Chinese exchanges and processes
Market data analysis and financial markets skills, particularly in use cases related to utilization of market data within trading firms.
Understanding of market data management practices and platforms.
Some knowledge in high-frequency trading systems and their technical integration with market data is advantageous.
Experience in managing external data vendor relationships, ensuring optimal service delivery.
Competence in handling data compliance considerations, particularly regarding adherence to exchange policies and other regulatory requirements.
Fluent in English
What you’ll get:
A performance-based bonus structure unmatched anywhere in the industry. We combine our profits across desks, teams and offices into a global profit pool, fostering a truly collaborative environment.
The chance to work alongside diverse and intelligent peers in a rewarding environment.
Training, mentorship and personal development opportunities.
Daily breakfast, lunch and snacks.
Gym membership, sports and leisure activities, plus weekly in-house chair massages
Regular social events, clubs and Friday afternoon drinks.

At Optiver, we are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive environment of mutual respect. Optiver recruits, employs, trains, compensates and promotes regardless of race, religion, color, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, physical or mental disability, or other legally protected characteristics.

Optiver is committed to
diversity and inclusion
. We encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds, and welcome requests for reasonable adjustments during the process.
Questions?
Get in touch with the recruitment team at careers@optiver.com.au.

Personal information protection is of utmost importance to Optiver. Before you provide any personal information to us, we strongly urge you to read our
Privacy Policy
to acknowledge how we collect and process your personal information.

company_box_content: Create better access and prices for all – that’s our goal for financial markets the world over. As a leading global electronic market maker, we are dedicated to our mission of continuously improving the market. It’s a responsibility we don’t take lightly. It’s the driving force behind our business. Even in times of extreme volatility, we stay the course. Resolute in our belief that the market should always be liquid for economies to thrive.

As one of the oldest market-making institutions, we’re a trusted partner of exchanges. Our contribution to them ensures they remain stable, transparent and competitive. We provide liquidity to financial markets using our own capital, at our own risk, trading a wide range of products: listed derivatives, cash equities, ETFs, bonds, and foreign currencies.
We strongly believe in the positive power of the world’s markets. That’s why we’re committed to leading the way in market making for environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) products.
Optiver is a global company with offices in Amsterdam, Sydney, Chicago, Austin, Taipei, Hong Kong, Shanghai, London and Singapore.
company_description: A global electronic market maker providing liquidity in financial markets using proprietary capital, with offices in multiple countries including Shanghai, focusing on trading derivatives, equities, and currencies.

head: Data Specialist - Data & Analytics - Beijing(315212)
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 4 天前 · 23 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Pursue a Career with Impact

At Deloitte China, we are on a mission to nurture and empower our people to become deep subject matter experts. We offer the perfect platform to unleash your full potential and equip you to thrive on challenges, and partner with our clients to solve their most complex problems. A world of opportunities awaits. Start your adventure and journey with us.
About The Business

Deloitte brings world-class capabilities and high-quality service to clients, delivering the insights they need to address their most complex business challenges. In the digital era, technology innovation and business are inextricably connected to each other. Given the high demand of technology-enabled business, Deloitte professionals help our clients facing the most critical information and technology challenges in their business.

We provide a broad spectrum of services to help our clients make greater impact on finance strategy formulation and execution. Our practice leverages resources, skills and technical tools from our various disciplines to help executives fulfil their evolving, expanded and increasingly complex roles, particularly in the areas of complex finance and accounting, as well as the development and implementation of strategies, to facilitate greater efficiencies and enable increased profitability.
Work you'll do

Conduct in-depth qualitative and quantitative analyses of clients’ financial, operational, and user data by leveraging statistical methods and big data techniques. Identify key risk indicators (KRIs) and support audit teams in performing risk assessment procedures

Check data integrity by validating computational accuracy and completeness in both operational and financial data, while detecting diverse risks across internal and external data sources through multidimensional data verification processes

Independently prepare audit workpapers and reports aligned with Deloitte standards. Actively contribute to core tasks throughout the project lifecycle, including summarizing interview notes, collecting documentation, creating process flow diagrams, and executing multi-dimensional data analysis

Proactively identify and explore innovative applications of cutting-edge technologies within audit workflows. Provide valuable insights and professional support to technology innovation teams, driving advancements in intelligent auditing capabilities and fostering continuous improvement in audit processes
Produce a high-quality work products and collaborate with others across phases of the project lifecycle to deliver a superior client experience
Manage work in an ethical manner with continuous attention to quality standards and risk rules, and maintaining confidentiality

During your tenure with us, you will demonstrate and develop your leadership and professional capabilities in the following areas: Inspiring, Creating purpose, Driving agility, Building diverse capability, Influencing, Collaborating, Delivering value, Building the business, Analytical acumen, Effective communication, Engagement management/delivery excellence, Managing change, Managing quality & risk, Strategic thinking and problem solving, and Tech savviness.
We are looking for someone with
To be considered for this position, you must demonstrate skills and experience in the following areas:
Bachelor or equivalent degree in statistics, mathematics, computer science, or a related area
At least 3 years of experience in finance, accounting, external audit, data analysis or a related field (including finance systems)
Demonstrates understanding of their role in planning the audit, performing tests of controls, and/or performing substantive procedures
Leverages technology to capitalize on the power of analytics and choose the appropriate technique for the underlying data set
Well-developed relationship management skills including teamwork and collaboration
Understands the limitations in analysis software and required input data format and is able to tweak the dataset to derive an effective visual
Fluent in at least 1-2 programming languages
Proficient in SQL, Python, R, Microsoft Power BI, Word, Excel and PowerPoint etc.
Shape your future through impact that matters

For more than 100 years of history, Deloitte witnessed also had the honor to be part of the economic boom in China by providing industry-leading audit & assurance, consulting, risk advisory, financial advisory, tax & business advisory services to nearly 90% of the Fortune Global 500 Chinese companies and thousands of private companies. Deloitte China today carries on our centenary professionalism and strives to become the undisputed leader in professional services in China with strong responsibility and capabilities in digitalization and multidisciplinary services.
Deloitte has been named China's Top Employer since 2006, Universum's Most Attractive Employer in China since 2008, and the Best Workplaces in Greater China since 2019.

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of their background, experience, identity, ability or thinking style, and if you need assistance during the application process for accessibility reasons this is available upon request. The preferred candidate will be subject to background screening by Deloitte China or by their external third-party provider.

Deloitte China delivers a comprehensive range of audit & assurance, consulting, financial advisory, risk advisory and tax services to local, multinational and growth enterprise clients in China.

head: Machine Learning Engineer (Fulfilment ETA)
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 2 周前 · 27 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace

Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team

The Fulfilment Interface Data Science team predicts the estimated time of arrival (ETA) and/or optimise the ETA quotation that balance among the ETA accuracy, system efficiency and marketplace throughput.
Get to Know the Role

We are looking for a Data Scientist to build sophisticated DNN models that predict ETA for Food orders and Transport bookings accurately under uncertainty. You will report to the Head of Data Science and is based onsite in Beijing.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

You will develop innovative Machine Learning or Deep Learning model that can predict the ETA of the food orders accurately. You will also build Optimisation models to balance the ETA accuracy and system efficiency.
You will establish pipelines to automate the model retraining and parameter tuning and serve the model in production.
You will build dashboards to monitor the model accuracy and service health. This will involve tracking model performance, identifying data drift issues, and implementing improvements.
You will create technical documents outlining the methodologies and findings of your work. You will present solutions and explain complex concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
You will collaborate with Product Analytic and Product Manager to conduct A/B experiment and data analysis.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
You hold a Bachelor or Master Degree in a relevant field such as Computer Science, Operations Research, Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, or Software Engineering.
You have solid background in at least two of the following domains: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Causal Inference and Operation Research.
You have 1 years of relevant working experience in tech companies or academic institutions.
You are proficient in Python, Tensorflow/Pytorch, SQL, and Spark, git.
You can develop data processing ETL pipelines to support data analysis, model training, and model serving tasks.
You are familiar with Version Control Systems such as git, git-flow, and understand the full software development life-cycle.
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab

We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that enables diverse Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. As an equal opportunity employer, we consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, religion, age, gender identity, sexual orientation, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

1. You will develop innovative Machine Learning or Deep Learning model that can predict the ETA of the food orders accurately. You will also build Optimisation models to balance the ETA accuracy and system efficiency.

job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Description – Marketplace Strategy, DiDi International Food Delivery
Team Mission

The International Food Delivery Marketplace Strategy team sets the company-wide playbook for delivery strategy, strategic decision support, and marketplace operations. We turn data into actionable insights that accelerate growth across all overseas markets.
What You’ll Do
Insight Generation

combine internal data mining with external best-practice research to produce compelling business insights that shape mid- and long-term planning.

Self-starter with continuous-learning mindset
comfortable in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.
Truth-seeking, open-minded, resilient
excellent communication skills.

international study / work experience preferred.

head: Editorial Data Analyst
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 53 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Description
Editorial Data Analyst
Location:
Beijing, CHN

Our mission is to unlock human potential. We welcome you for who you are, the background you bring, and we embrace individuals who get excited about learning. Bring your experiences, your perspectives, and your passion
it’s in our differences that we empower the way the world learns.
About The Role
Position Overview

We are seeking a highly motivated Editorial Data Analyst to join our Business Analytics & Enablement team at Wiley. This role offers an exciting opportunity to work in a collaborative environment, leveraging data analytics and business intelligence tools to influence the performance of our products, platforms, and services within Research Publishing. The ideal candidate will be passionate about data discovery, possess strong analytical and communication skills, and enjoy using data to inform key decisions and drive continuous improvement across editorial operations.
Key Responsibilities
Performance Reporting and Analysis
Generate and review product, service, and platform performance reports and dashboards, sharing insights with key stakeholders.
Support and maintain Research Publishing's specific data tools, ensuring alignment across editorial models.
Monitor and assess platform and product performance, providing analytical support to drive improvements and meet KPIs.
Present data insights to stakeholders in a clear and actionable format.
Data Insights and Stakeholder Collaboration
Analyze performance trends across journals, services, and platforms, with a focus on both routine operations and periods of heightened attention (e.g., following releases).
Collaborate with internal teams such as Peer Review Performance Managers, Editorial Vendor Managers, and in-house editors to improve product/service performance.
Data Integrity Management
Ensure data integrity by troubleshooting issues and collaborating with stakeholders to provide solutions for data validity concerns.
Document activities in line with departmental frameworks, ensuring reproducibility and discoverability.
Decision-Making and Data Communication
Evaluate the significance of data insights and decide when to take action or communicate findings.
Identify key stakeholders who need to be informed of specific analyses and provide appropriate recommendations.
Offer analytical support for maintaining, optimizing, or sunsetting products or services.
Required Qualifications
Education:
Bachelor's degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical field.
Experience:
1-3 years of relevant or transferable experience in data analytics or a related field.
Experience with data analytics methodologies, including data cleaning, exploration, and visualization.
Technical Skills:
Proficiency in SQL (Intermediate to Advanced level).
Experience with BI dashboard development (Intermediate to Advanced level), ideally in PowerBI.
Strong expertise in Microsoft Excel and data analysis.
Experience in using statistical tools like SPSS, SAS, STATA, or programming languages like Python or R for data analysis.
Familiarity with Power Automate is a plus.
Core Competencies:
Strong analytical and communication skills with a passion for data.
Ability to collaborate across teams and gain trust from various stakeholders.
Results-oriented, self-motivated, and able to work independently to achieve objectives.
Capable of troubleshooting and solving problems with attention to detail.
Experience in data storytelling and presenting complex information clearly.
Desirable Skills & Experience
Exposure to the scholarly publishing industry is preferred, but not required.
Previous experience in data integrity management or data visualization will be an advantage.
A proactive approach to learning new skills and methodologies in data analytics.
About Wiley

Wiley is a trusted leader in research and learning, our pioneering solutions and services are paving the way for knowledge seekers as they work to solve the world's most important challenges. We are advocates of advancement, empowering knowledge-seekers to transform today's biggest obstacles into tomorrow's brightest opportunities.

With over 200 years of experience in publishing, we continue to evolve knowledge seekers' steps into strides, illuminating their path forward to personal, educational, and professional success at every stage. Around the globe, we break down barriers for innovators, empowering them to advance discoveries in their fields, adapt their workforces, and shape minds.

Wiley is an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer. We evaluate all qualified applicants and treat all qualified applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, genetic information, or based on any individual's status in any group or class protected by applicable federal, state or local laws. Wiley is also committed to providing reasonable accommodation to applicants and employees with disabilities. Applicants who require accommodation to participate in the job application process may contact tasupport@wiley.com for assistance.

We are proud that our workplace promotes continual learning and internal mobility. Our values support courageous teammates, needle movers, and learning champions all while striving to support the health and well-being of all employees. We offer meeting-free Friday afternoons allowing more time for heads down work and professional development, and through a robust body of employee programing we facilitate a wide range of opportunities to foster community, learn, and grow.

We are committed to fair, transparent pay, and we strive to provide competitive compensation in addition to a comprehensive benefits package. It is anticipated that most qualified candidates will fall within the range, however the ultimate salary offered for this role may be higher or lower and will be set based on a variety of non-discriminatory factors, including but not limited to, geographic location, skills, and competencies. Wiley proactively displays target base pay range for United Kingdom, Canada and USA based roles.

head: AI Engineer
info: 中国 北京市 · 2 周前 · 54 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
岗位职责
1. 参与设计并实现基于大模型的AI应用方案；
2. 参与构建与优化 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）系统，协助数据检索、模型调优与性能优化；
3. 学习并掌握 Transformer 架构及主流预训练模型（如BERT、Llama、GPT等），探索其在不同业务场景中的应用；
4. 负责数据集的收集、清洗与标注工作，支持模型训练与测试实验，并参与基于实验反馈的模型改进；
5. 与跨职能团队（产品、算法、工程）协作，支持AI模型的API部署与产品功能落地；
6. 持续关注 Web3、区块链与AI结合方向 的最新研究进展，参与创新应用探索项目。
任职要求
1. 计算机科学、人工智能、机器学习、数据科学或相关专业，本科及以上学历；
2. 具备扎实的编程基础，熟悉 Python / Java / Go 等至少一种语言；
3. 了解 Transformer 模型原理，对LLM、大语言模型或RAG系统有基础理解；
4. 熟悉数据处理与分析流程，如数据预处理、ETL、SQL、Pandas、向量数据库等；
5. 了解深度学习框架（PyTorch / TensorFlow）；
6. 具备良好的学习能力、逻辑思维与问题解决能力，能主动探索AI与业务结合的创新应用；
7. 有以下经历者优先：
1. 曾参与RAG或大模型微调项目（课程、科研、实习均可）；
2. 了解Web3 / 区块链基础知识；
3. 在AI竞赛、开源项目中有贡献记录（如GitHub、Kaggle）

Responsibilities

For this position, you will design and develop AI/ML solutions using a combination of traditional machine learning, deep learning, large language models (LLMs), generative AI, and intelligent agents to address various manufacturing challenges. Typical tasks include:
Developing predictive maintenance models using sensor data and time series forecasting techniques.
Implementing quality prediction and defect detection models leveraging computer vision and deep learning.
Applying large language models and generative AI for intelligent knowledge management, natural language understanding, and decision support.
Creating intelligent agents to optimize production scheduling and operational workflows.
Collaborating with plant engineers and domain experts to identify data-driven opportunities and validate AI models in real manufacturing settings.
Communication: You will visualize, explain, and present AI/ML results, from traditional models to advanced generative AI solutions, to ensure clear understanding by business stakeholders.
Implementation: You will work closely with software and automation teams to integrate AI solutions into manufacturing execution systems for real-time production support.
Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Applied Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, or related disciplines.
5+ years of professional experience in AI/ML, including traditional machine learning, deep learning, and modern large model/LLM technologies
manufacturing domain experience is preferred.
Proficient in Python and familiar with machine learning libraries such as scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM, as well as deep learning frameworks like PyTorch and TensorFlow.
Experience with large language models (e.g., GPT, BERT), generative AI frameworks, and transfer learning techniques.
Hands-on with typical manufacturing datasets: time series sensor signals, image/video data for vision tasks, text data for NLP applications.
Ability to design, train and deploy AI models that integrate multi-source heterogeneous data for manufacturing problem-solving.
Strong communication skills in English, both written and oral.
Proactive, collaborative, analytical mindset with good problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure.

As a global company with employees around the world, it is important to us that we treat each other with respect and value all ideas and perspectives. By appreciating our differences, we inspire creativity and drive innovation. In this way, we contribute to sustainable value creation for our stakeholders and society as a whole. Together, we advance how the world moves.
Exciting assignments and outstanding development opportunities await you because we impact the future with innovation. We look forward to your application.

Yan Hong
